mapper.insert: INSERT INTO consultation (consultation_no, patient_id, type, status, department, chief_complaint, medical_summary, fee, payment_status) VALUES (#{consultationNo}, #{patientId}, #{type}, #{status}, #{department}, #{chiefComplaint}, #{medicalSummary}, #{fee}, #{paymentStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.consultation_no, c.patient_id, c.type, c.status, c.department, c.chief_complaint, c.medical_summary, c.fee, c.payment_status, c.scheduled_time, c.end_time, c.cancel_reason, c.reject_reason, c.create_time, c.update_time, p.name AS patient_name, p.age AS patient_age, p.gender AS patient_gender FROM consultation c LEFT JOIN patient p ON c.patient_id = p.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM consultation WHERE patient_id = #{patientId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE consultation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultation SET medical_summary = #{medicalSummary} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultation SET type = #{type}, fee = #{fee} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE consultation SET payment_status = #{paymentStatus} WHERE id = #{id}
